source.name: Google Trends
source.location: Yale Data-Intensive Social Sciences, Google Trends Collection Framework

gtrends_naloxone.long_name: Google Trends Search Volume of Term naloxone
gtrends_naloxone.short_description: Google search volume of the term naloxone.
gtrends_naloxone.long_description: Google trends search volume of the term naloxone. Values are the probabilities of a short search session including the term within the geography and timeframe, multiplied by 10 million.
gtrends_naloxone.statement: There is a {value} / 10M chance of a short search session including the term naloxone
